pr.title: Axiom Atlas v1: local-first, read-only visual map (module bubbles + capability/evidence panels)
pr.description:
## Summary

New CLI command `axiom atlas` — the first navigable visual of the platform, requested for operator visibility. It renders **existing artifacts only** into a single self-contained HTML page under `artifacts/atlas/` (gitignored):

- **Module bubble graph**: the newest execution-chain `self_model.json` — 167 modules as bubbles (size = import degree, color = top-level package) connected by 359 import edges, vanilla-JS/SVG force layout, hover highlights a module's edges.
- **Capability panel**: latest per-capability confidence/readiness from `capability_evidence_intake` reports, colored pills (very_high/ready green → blocked red), decision counts.
- **Captured evidence panel**: the tracked `artifacts/validation_runs/*/evidence_summary.json` proof objects with quality-verdict and promotion-decision pills.

`axiom atlas --serve [--port N]` hosts the page via stdlib `http.server` bound to **127.0.0.1 only** — the local URL where Axiom "lives".

```
$ axiom atlas --json-output
{"atlas_html": "artifacts/atlas/atlas.html", "module_count": 167,
 "import_edge_count": 359, "capability_count": 1, "evidence_summary_count": 1}
```

**What behavior changed:** additive only — new `atlas` command + `src/axiom_core/atlas.py` (`build_atlas_data` / `render_atlas_html` / `write_atlas` / `serve_atlas`); cataloged in the runner command registry (READ_ONLY/SAFE) and the registry coverage test; `artifacts/atlas/` gitignored; BHV-035 ledger entry; `tests/test_atlas.py` added to CI.

**What did NOT change:** no capability/confidence/readiness/promotion/evidence semantics; no execution-chain change — the viewer is a consumer, not a producer. Local-first: no CDN, no frameworks, no external calls; chat surface out of scope for v1. 2024 Revit baseline unaffected; no Revit live validation required.

**Tests run:** `tests/test_atlas.py` (data collection, empty-workspace grace, no absolute paths, self-contained/no-CDN HTML, script-injection escaping, read-only over source artifacts, registry governance) + registry/local-runner/evidence-summary suites: 112 passed / 1 skipped; ruff clean. Full pytest not run (additive viewer tooling; tiered testing policy).

**Factory relevance:** evidence-artifact/navigation improvement — makes the self-model, capability state, and captured proof objects visible and navigable; first UI slice of the Phase-2 navigable graph.

## Screenshot

![Axiom Atlas](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..ox1gUwiEo8g22_sM2qZoKcZKeV1gTlJHq7pfdbUZsXg)


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev

commits.author: plamen.hristov@imsdevlab.onmicrosoft.com
commits.message:
Add Axiom Atlas: local-first read-only visual map (axiom atlas)

- New CLI command 'axiom atlas' renders the newest execution-chain
  self-model (module bubbles + import edges), capability
  confidence/readiness from intake records, and tracked evidence
  summaries into a self-contained vanilla-JS/SVG page under
  artifacts/atlas/ (gitignored). Optional --serve hosts it on 127.0.0.1
  via stdlib http.server only.
- Read-only viewer: mutates no capability/confidence/readiness/
  promotion state; no external calls, no CDN assets, no new framework.
- Cataloged in the runner command registry (READ_ONLY/SAFE) and in the
  registry coverage test; tests in tests/test_atlas.py; BHV-035.

Co-Authored-By: Devin AI <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
